# Cluster Analysis Report — 2024 Event Fingerprints

*Generated by `fingerprint.cluster`. 5-D feature vector per event, z-scored globally, k-means with silhouette-picked k. Ward linkage hierarchical for the dendrogram. UMAP for viz only.*

## Silhouette sweep

|   k |   silhouette |
|----:|-------------:|
|   2 |       0.5456 |
|   3 |       0.3846 |
|   4 |       0.4177 |
|   5 |       0.4318 |
|   6 |       0.4519 |
|   7 |       0.4516 |
|   8 |       0.3939 |

**Chosen k = 2** (highest silhouette = 0.5456).

## Cluster centers (z-score space)

|   cluster_kmeans |   n_events |   peak_intensity_log |   lead_time_h |   lag_time_h |   asymmetry_ratio |   half_life_h |
|-----------------:|-----------:|---------------------:|--------------:|-------------:|------------------:|--------------:|
|                0 |        415 |                -0.18 |         -0.38 |        -0.22 |             -0.26 |         -0.14 |
|                1 |         80 |                 0.95 |          1.96 |         1.12 |              1.35 |          0.74 |

*Each cluster's mean in the standardized feature space. Read each row as a fingerprint archetype — e.g., positive `peak_intensity` and positive `half_life_h` means 'big peak, slow decay'.*

## Forced k=6 (finer structure)

Silhouette picked k=2 because two coarse clusters (indoor-quick vs outdoor-slow) dominate the variance. To check whether finer structure exists, we also report k=6 (a local silhouette peak among higher k):

Cluster centers at k=6 (z-score space):

|   cluster_kmeans_k6 |   n_events |   peak_intensity_log |   lead_time_h |   lag_time_h |   asymmetry_ratio |   half_life_h |
|--------------------:|-----------:|---------------------:|--------------:|-------------:|------------------:|--------------:|
|                   0 |         47 |                 1.21 |          2.63 |         0.54 |              1.41 |         -0.1  |
|                   1 |        206 |                -0.8  |         -0.42 |        -0.78 |             -0.29 |         -0.57 |
|                   2 |         88 |                -0.26 |         -0.29 |         0.75 |             -0.23 |          0.93 |
|                   3 |         19 |                 0.83 |          0.7  |         3.22 |             -0.04 |          3.32 |
|                   4 |        130 |                 0.93 |         -0.28 |         0.11 |             -0.19 |         -0.15 |
|                   5 |          5 |                -1.06 |          2.43 |        -1.15 |              7.98 |         -0.96 |

## Test 1 — Knicks (NBA) vs Rangers (NHL) at MSG

Cluster assignment:

| event_type   |   0 |   1 |   total |
|:-------------|----:|----:|--------:|
| Sports-NBA   |  47 |   0 |      47 |
| Sports-NHL   |  40 |   6 |      46 |

Feature medians (raw scale, not log):

| event_type   |   peak_intensity |   lead_time_h |   lag_time_h |   asymmetry_ratio |   half_life_h |
|:-------------|-----------------:|--------------:|-------------:|------------------:|--------------:|
| Sports-NBA   |            0.957 |             0 |          1   |                 0 |         0.333 |
| Sports-NHL   |            0.648 |             0 |          1.5 |                 0 |         0.5   |

Feature-level statistical tests (NBA vs NHL):

| feature         |   Sports-NBA_median |   Sports-NHL_median |   Sports-NBA_n |   Sports-NHL_n |   MWU_p |   ttest_p | sig_at_0.05   |
|:----------------|--------------------:|--------------------:|---------------:|---------------:|--------:|----------:|:--------------|
| peak_intensity  |               0.957 |               0.648 |             47 |             46 | 0.0041  |   0.00787 | True          |
| lead_time_h     |               0     |               0     |             47 |             46 | 0.02335 |   0.02022 | True          |
| lag_time_h      |               1     |               1.5   |             47 |             46 | 0.88474 |   0.99428 | False         |
| asymmetry_ratio |               0     |               0     |             47 |             46 | 0.02337 |   0.07857 | True          |
| half_life_h     |               0.333 |               0.5   |             47 |             46 | 0.63629 |   0.53605 | False         |

## Test 2 — MLB day vs night games at Yankee Stadium

Cluster assignment:

| session   |   0 |   1 |   total |
|:----------|----:|----:|--------:|
| day       |  30 |   1 |      31 |
| night     |  53 |   4 |      57 |

Feature medians (raw scale, not log):

| session   |   peak_intensity |   lead_time_h |   lag_time_h |   asymmetry_ratio |   half_life_h |
|:----------|-----------------:|--------------:|-------------:|------------------:|--------------:|
| day       |           11.836 |             0 |            3 |                 0 |         0.756 |
| night     |           33.51  |             0 |            4 |                 0 |         1     |

Feature-level statistical tests (day vs night):

| feature         |   day_median |   night_median |   day_n |   night_n |   MWU_p |   ttest_p | sig_at_0.05   |
|:----------------|-------------:|---------------:|--------:|----------:|--------:|----------:|:--------------|
| peak_intensity  |       11.836 |          33.51 |      31 |        57 | 0       |   0       | True          |
| lead_time_h     |        0     |           0    |      31 |        57 | 0.03051 |   0.01632 | True          |
| lag_time_h      |        3     |           4    |      31 |        57 | 0.16314 |   0.59551 | False         |
| asymmetry_ratio |        0     |           0    |      31 |        57 | 0.03052 |   0.01244 | True          |
| half_life_h     |        0.756 |           1    |      31 |        57 | 0.08459 |   0.43855 | False         |

## Test 3 — Are concerts a distinct cluster?

|   cluster_kmeans |   Civic |   Concert |   Other |   Parade |   Sports-MLB |   Sports-NBA |   Sports-NHL |
|-----------------:|--------:|----------:|--------:|---------:|-------------:|-------------:|-------------:|
|                0 |       2 |       150 |       0 |        2 |          138 |           83 |           40 |
|                1 |       1 |         9 |      24 |        2 |           36 |            2 |            6 |

Modal cluster for Concert events: **0** (94.3% of all concerts).
Within cluster 0: **150** / **415** members are concerts (36.1% purity).
